details.test: Task 1: Register earliest beginner 3D printing after 17:00 within next 14 days (adapted)
Task 2: Add at least two free events (09:00-19:00) to My Schedule (adapted)
Task 3: Bookmark free event with highest remaining capacity (adapted)
Task 4: Join waitlist for earlier 3D printing workshop (adapted from Arduino)
Task 5: Submit group reservation for an event allowing group bookings (adapted)
Task 6: Open print-friendly view for evening event (adapted)
Task 7: Register earliest 3D printing and later skill-building sessions (adapted)
Task 8: Download .ics file for event between 15:00 and 19:00 (adapted)
Task 9: Register advanced-like workshop and bookmark its prerequisite (adapted)
